creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Sat Mar  8 12:49:02 2014
New Revision: 347489
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347489
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347489/

Log:
  - Update to version 2.3.2, take maintainership [1]
  - Correct LICENSE [1]
  - Add staging support [1]
  - Use USES=zip
  - Remove leading article from COMMENT
  - Docs files don't need optional installation with stage, convert
    installation procedure to COPYTREE_SHARE
  
  PR:		ports/187336
  Submitted by:	Jim Ohlstein <jim@ohlste.in>

Modified:
  head/databases/hsqldb/Makefile
  head/databases/hsqldb/distinfo
  head/databases/hsqldb/pkg-plist

Modified: head/databases/hsqldb/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/hsqldb/Makefile	Sat Mar  8 12:49:01 2014	(r347488)
+++ head/databases/hsqldb/Makefile	Sat Mar  8 12:49:02 2014	(r347489)
@@ -2,47 +2,37 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	hsqldb
-PORTVERSION=	2.3.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.3.2
 CATEGORIES=	databases java
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}_2_3
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	An embeddable SQL database written in Java
+MAINTAINER=	jim@ohlste.in
+COMMENT=	Embeddable SQL database written in Java
 
-LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE=	BSD3CLAUSE
 
-USES=		zip
 USE_JAVA=	yes
 JAVA_VERSION=	1.6+
 USE_ANT=	yes
+USES=		zip
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}/${PORTNAME}
 BUILD_WRKSRC=	${WRKSRC}/build
 ALL_TARGET=	hsqldb hsqljdbc
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
 do-install:
-	@${ECHO_MSG} -n ">> Installing JAR files to ${JAVAJARDIR}..."
-	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/hsqldb.jar \
-		${JAVAJARDIR}/hsqldb.jar
-	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/hsqljdbc.jar \
-		${JAVAJARDIR}/hsqljdbc.jar
-	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/sqltool.jar \
-		${JAVAJARDIR}/sqltool.jar
-	@${ECHO_MSG} " [DONE]"
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${ECHO_MSG} -n ">> Installing DOC files to ${DOCSDIR}..."
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/readme.txt ${DOCSDIR}
-	cd ${WRKSRC}/doc \
-		&& ${FIND} . -type d -exec ${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}/\{} \; \
-		&& ${FIND} . -type f -exec ${INSTALL_DATA} \{} ${DOCSDIR}/\{} \;
-	@${ECHO_MSG} " [DONE]"
-.endif
+	${MKDIR}  ${STAGEDIR}${JAVAJARDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/hsqldb.jar \
+		${STAGEDIR}${JAVAJARDIR}/hsqldb.jar
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/hsqljdbc.jar \
+		${STAGEDIR}${JAVAJARDIR}/hsqljdbc.jar
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/sqltool.jar \
+		${STAGEDIR}${JAVAJARDIR}/sqltool.jar
+
+post-install:
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/readme.txt ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}/doc && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR})
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/databases/hsqldb/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/hsqldb/distinfo	Sat Mar  8 12:49:01 2014	(r347488)
+++ head/databases/hsqldb/distinfo	Sat Mar  8 12:49:02 2014	(r347489)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (hsqldb-2.3.0.zip) = 74faf1bbfccc72703ada7aa2413d12bbbc728bea74382b50301b80051174316d
-SIZE (hsqldb-2.3.0.zip) = 7704891
+SHA256 (hsqldb-2.3.2.zip) = 573082ab3f1c8f02c1f496b9aae15b74f1b5aedf3812ef300e90ead3047e5fb0
+SIZE (hsqldb-2.3.2.zip) = 7734168
